modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Emails are delayed when sent to me in Outlook.

full_description_text: I am having a problem with my emails. When someone sends me an email, there is a delay. It takes a long time for me to receive them. This is really frustrating and I need it to be fixed.
short_description: Emails are delayed when sent to me in Outlook.
description: I am having a problem with my emails. When someone sends me an email, there is a delay. It takes a long time for me to receive them. This is really frustrating and I need it to be fixed.
